title: A simple publishing home for ST-IU.
intro: ST-IU is a clean and fast site for daily updates, build logs, ideas, and selected research notes. Designed to stay lightweight, professional, and easy to update.
sideText: A focused front-end for public updates, project milestones, short notes, and ongoing technical work.
box1Text: Quick updates, progress snapshots, and next steps.
box2Text: Technical changes, fixes, milestones, and experiments.
box3Text: Concepts, observations, and selected thought work.
simpleText: Posts live in src/content/posts/. The custom admin page can publish directly to GitHub.
latestText: The newest published updates from ST-IU.
fastText: Create a Markdown file, push it, and deploy. Or use the admin to publish directly.
nextText: Continue building ST-IU with a lightweight publishing workflow.
